title: Editing a form after submitting
excerpt:

posts.author: Maya69 (Maya Foner)
posts.cookedHtml:
Is there a way for co-workers to edit a form after they have submitted it?
i.e I crated a form in which my colleagues need to fill in planned events which have to go in a newsletter. What happens if they want to make a change to the program description or any one of the other items after submitting it. Is that possible?
Thanks!

posts.author: MsquareAutomation (Msquare Automation Solutions)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi@Maya69 ,
There are a few third-party apps that allow you to edit forms after they have been submitted. One such app is SuperForm. SuperForm allows you to create forms that can be used to update existing items.
If you only need to make a few changes to a submitted form, you can create a new form with the updated information. This is a good option if the changes are minor.
